name: Virtual World Kyubi - Shenshen
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>電</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>脳</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>のう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>堺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>狐</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>仙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>シェン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>々</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>シェン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
Any card sent from the field to the GY is banished instead. You can only use each of the following effects of "Virtual World Kyubi - Shenshen" once per turn. When your monster declares an attack: You can return 1 banished monster to the owner's GY. During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the GY: You can banish 2 other monsters from your GY with different original Types and Attributes from each other; Special Summon this card from your GY.

action: Returns banished cards to the Graveyard
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes cards that would be sent to the Graveyard
